Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception.GeminiApiException

  • Packages that use GeminiApiException 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception
    Provides exception classes specific to the Gemini API.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl
    Provides implementations for Gemini API resource interfaces.
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec
    Provides specifications and interfaces for Gemini API resources.

    • Uses of GeminiApiException in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception

      Subclasses of GeminiApiException in com.enovka.gemini4j.client.exception 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  GeminiFailedPreconditionException
      Thrown when a precondition is not met.
      class  GeminiInternalException
      Thrown when an unexpected error occurs on the server side.
      class  GeminiInvalidArgumentException
      Thrown when the request contains an invalid argument.
      class  GeminiNotFoundException
      Thrown when the requested resource is not found.
      class  GeminiPermissionDeniedException
      Thrown when the API key doesn't have sufficient permissions.
      class  GeminiResourceExhaustedException
      Thrown when the rate limit is exceeded.
      class  GeminiUnavailableException
      Thrown when the service is temporarily overloaded or unavailable.

    • Uses of GeminiApiException in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that throw GeminiApiException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GeminiResult GenerateTextRequestBuilder.execute()
      Executes the generateText request synchronously and returns the response.

    • Uses of GeminiApiException in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.impl that throw GeminiApiException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      BatchEmbedContentsResponse EmbedResourceImpl.batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
      Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
      EmbedContentResponse EmbedResourceImpl.embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
      Generates an embedding for the given content.
      GeminiResult GenerationResourceImpl.generateContent​(GenerateContentRequest request)
      Generates content using the provided request.
      Model ModelResourceImpl.getModel​(String modelName)
      Retrieves a specific Gemini model by its name.
      ListModel ModelResourceImpl.listModels()
      Retrieves a list of available Gemini models.

    • Uses of GeminiApiException in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.spec that throw GeminiApiException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      BatchEmbedContentsResponse EmbedResource.batchEmbedContent​(BatchEmbedContentsRequest request)
      Generates embeddings for multiple contents in a batch request.
      EmbedContentResponse EmbedResource.embedContent​(EmbedContentRequest request)
      Generates an embedding for the given content.
      GeminiResult GenerationResource.generateContent​(GenerateContentRequest request)
      Generates content using the provided request.
      protected HttpResponse AbstractResource.get​(String endpoint, Map<String,​String> headers)
      Makes a GET request to the specified endpoint and handles potential errors.
      Model ModelResource.getModel​(String modelName)
      Retrieves a specific Gemini model by its name.
      ListModel ModelResource.listModels()
      Retrieves a list of available Gemini models.
      protected HttpResponse AbstractResource.post​(String endpoint, String body, Map<String,​String> headers)
      Makes a POST request to the specified endpoint and handles potential errors.
